nodes.label: React Frontend
nodes.description: User interface. Stores JWT in localStorage and communicates with Express API.

nodes.label: Express API
nodes.description: Node.js backend handling routes, authentication, and database interactions.

nodes.label: Passport Authentication
nodes.description: Handles local authentication and Google OAuth.

nodes.label: JWT Token System
nodes.description: Creates and verifies tokens for authenticated API requests.

nodes.label: MongoDB Atlas
nodes.description: Primary data store containing users and places collections.

nodes.label: Image Storage
nodes.description: Local filesystem storage in public/images for uploaded place photos.

connections.description: React sends REST API requests to Express.
Express generates and verifies JWT tokens.
Passport handles login and OAuth flows.
User redirected to Google login and back to callback.
Express reads and writes user and place documents.
Uploaded images saved to local filesystem via Multer.
React sends JWT token in Authorization header.

google_oauth_flow: Server redirects to frontend /oauth-success with token
authenticated_request_flow: React sends API request with Authorization header

security_layers: File type and size validation for uploads
